emails.subject: Price Update for SDG&E
emails.body: Price Update for SDG&E The RFP provided for our updating prices by noon today. Here is what I sent out just a few minutes ago. We don't know if they are going to disqualify us because we are not keeping our prices open, but we are trying to stay in the game. (Jeff: please forward tthis to Jim Steffes with a copy to me. I can't find him in the Enron Corp. e-mail.) C
